name: Diazepam
description: benzodiazepine ti n ṣiṣẹ pipẹ. Ti a lo fun iṣakoso ijagba, spasm iṣan, ati anxiolysis. Geli rectal (Diastat) wulo ni awọn eto aaye nigbati IV ko si. Iye to gun ju lorazepam lọ.
indications: Spasm iṣan lati ipalara ọpa-ẹhin tabi tetanus
Adjunct antidote oluranlowo nerve (ninu awọn ohun elo CHEMPACK)
dose: Imudani: 5-10 mg IV titari lọra. Tun q10-15 iṣẹju (max 30 mg). Rectal: 0.2-0.5 mg / kg. IM gbigba aiṣedeede -- yago fun IM ti o ba ṣeeṣe.
warnings: Gbigba IM jẹ aiṣedeede ati irora - fẹ IV, rectal, tabi lo midazolam IM dipo.
Iye gigun ti sedation (24-48h fun awọn abere ti o tun).
Awọn olufaragba aṣoju aifọkanbalẹ: diazepam wa ninu awọn ohun elo CHEMPACK fun ijagba lati idaamu cholinergic.

pediatric.dose: IV: 0.1-0.3 mg/kg (max 10 mg). Rectal: 0.3-0.5 mg / kg. Lo ipa ọna rectal nigbati IV ko si.
pediatric.note: Geli diastat rectal wulo paapaa fun awọn ijagba ọmọde ni awọn eto aaye.

obstetric.note: Rekọja placenta. O le fa hypotonia ọmọ tuntun, ibanujẹ atẹgun. Lo fun awọn ijagba iya nikan ko ṣe idahun si iṣuu magnẹsia.

source: JTS CPG / CHEMPACK Program / Standard Seizure Management
